parameters.query:
insert into runrun_staging.boards (
    id,
    name,
    is_public,
    is_default,
    is_editable,
    dashboard_id,
    quick_create_is_enabled,
    allow_members_to_create_forms,
    extracted_at
)
select distinct on (id)
    id,
    name,
    is_public,
    is_default,
    is_editable,
    dashboard_id,
    quick_create_is_enabled,
    allow_members_to_create_forms,
    _airbyte_extracted_at
from runrun_raw.boards
order by id, _airbyte_extracted_at desc
on conflict (id) do update
set
    name = excluded.name,
    is_public = excluded.is_public,
    is_default = excluded.is_default,
    is_editable = excluded.is_editable,
    dashboard_id = excluded.dashboard_id,
    quick_create_is_enabled = excluded.quick_create_is_enabled,
    allow_members_to_create_forms = excluded.allow_members_to_create_forms,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
where runrun_staging.boards.extracted_at < excluded.extracted_at;

insert into runrun_staging.projects (
    id,
    name,
    client_id,
    client_name,
    is_active,
    is_closed,
    time_worked,
    cost_total,
    tasks_count,
    extracted_at
)
select distinct on (id)
    id,
    name,
    client_id,
    client_name,
    is_active,
    is_closed,
    time_worked,
    cost_total,
    tasks_count,
    _airbyte_extracted_at
from runrun_raw.projects
order by id, _airbyte_extracted_at desc
on conflict (id) do update
set
    name = excluded.name,
    client_id = excluded.client_id,
    client_name = excluded.client_name,
    is_active = excluded.is_active,
    is_closed = excluded.is_closed,
    time_worked = excluded.time_worked,
    cost_total = excluded.cost_total,
    tasks_count = excluded.tasks_count,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
where runrun_staging.projects.extracted_at < excluded.extracted_at;

insert into runrun_staging.users (
    id,
    name,
    email,
    position,
    team_ids,
    cost_hour,
    is_manager,
    is_master,
    on_vacation,
    extracted_at
)
select distinct on (id)
    id,
    name,
    email,
    position,
    team_ids,
    cost_hour,
    is_manager,
    is_master,
    on_vacation,
    _airbyte_extracted_at
from runrun_raw.users
order by id, _airbyte_extracted_at desc
on conflict (id) do update
set
    name = excluded.name,
    email = excluded.email,
    position = excluded.position,
    team_ids = excluded.team_ids,
    cost_hour = excluded.cost_hour,
    is_manager = excluded.is_manager,
    is_master = excluded.is_master,
    on_vacation = excluded.on_vacation,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
where runrun_staging.users.extracted_at < excluded.extracted_at;
